      @PostMapping("/{teamId}/join-requests") public org.springframework.http.ResponseEntity<TeamJoinRequestResponse> createJoinRequest(@AuthenticationPrincipal org.springframework.security.core.userdetails.UserDetails userDetails, @PathVariable Long teamId)

    • cancelJoinRequest

      @PostMapping("/{teamId}/join-requests/cancel") public org.springframework.http.ResponseEntity<ApiMessageResponse> cancelJoinRequest(@AuthenticationPrincipal org.springframework.security.core.userdetails.UserDetails userDetails, @PathVariable Long teamId)

    • approveJoinRequest

      @PostMapping("/{teamId}/join-requests/{userId}/approve") public org.springframework.http.ResponseEntity<TeamJoinRequestDecisionResponse> approveJoinRequest(@AuthenticationPrincipal org.springframework.security.core.userdetails.UserDetails userDetails, @PathVariable Long teamId, @PathVariable Long userId)

      @PostMapping("/{teamId}/join-requests/{userId}/reject") public org.springframework.http.ResponseEntity<TeamJoinRequestDecisionResponse> rejectJoinRequest(@AuthenticationPrincipal org.springframework.security.core.userdetails.UserDetails userDetails, @PathVariable Long teamId, @PathVariable Long userId)

    • removeMember

      @PostMapping("/{teamId}/members/{userId}/remove") public org.springframework.http.ResponseEntity<ApiMessageResponse> removeMember(@AuthenticationPrincipal org.springframework.security.core.userdetails.UserDetails userDetails, @PathVariable Long teamId, @PathVariable Long userId)
